_comment: Input to scripts/generate-pipeline-template.mjs. Edit this + schema.graphql, then run `npm run generate`. Never hand-edit the generated pipeline.template.yaml.
_exclude_comment: Entities deliberately NOT sunk to Postgres. Every entry needs a reason. Omitting an entity from the pipeline is otherwise INVISIBLE: it indexes fine, deploys fine, and silently never reaches Neon. royco-rwa declares 31 entities and wires 24, with no record of which 7 gaps are intentional — this list exists so that can't happen here.
